channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Fewer Americans say democracy is central to country’s identity, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll finds that as the U.S. prepares for an extravagant celebration of its founding principles, fewer Americans see their country or its system of government as exceptional.

item.title: A flesh-eating cattle parasite spreads beyond Texas as new far-flung screwworm cases are found
Los Angeles trial begins for man accused of sparking the deadly Palisades Fire
